items.discover.description: Sidebar nav link to the domain discovery / search home page.

items.myDomains.description: Sidebar nav link to the list of domains the signed-in user owns.

items.myWishlist.description: Sidebar nav link to the user's saved/wishlisted domains.

items.myOrders.description: Sidebar nav link to the user's order history.

items.myFreeMints.description: Sidebar nav link to the user's free-claim / free-mint rewards.

items.myPaymentMethods.description: Sidebar nav link to the user's saved payment methods.

items.manage.description: Sidebar nav link to the domain & DNS management area (DNS records, DNSSEC, nameservers).

items.justAing.description: Brand/product name for the AI naming tool. Trademarked — keep verbatim, do not translate.

items.brandStudio.description: Nav link to Namefi Brand Studio (AI branding). Keep 'Namefi'; translate the descriptor.

items.outbound.description: Nav link to the Namefi Outbound feature. Keep 'Namefi'; translate the descriptor.

items.feed.description: Nav link to the Namefi Feed (marketplace activity). Keep 'Namefi'; translate the descriptor.

items.hunt.description: Sidebar nav link to the Domain Hunt feature (community voting on domains).

recentDomains.description: Sidebar section label above the list of domains the user recently viewed.

items.profile.description: Account-menu / sidebar nav label linking to the user's profile page. Means 'Profile'.
